bird.name: Speckled warbler
bird.summary: The speckled warbler (Pyrrholaemus sagittatus) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is endemic to eastern Australia.

locations.name: 麥凱 (昆士蘭州)
locations.summary: 麥凱（英语：Mackay，/məˈkaɪ/）乃位於澳大利亚昆士蘭州中部的一座沿海城市，位于布里斯班以北970公里，人口81,148（2009年）。该市盛产甘蔗，蔗糖产量约占全国的三分之一，有"澳大利亚蔗糖之都"（英語：Sugar Capi…

locations.name: Charleville, Queensland
locations.summary: Charleville () is a rural town and locality in the Shire of Murweh, Queensland, Australia.

relations.subject: Speckled warbler
relations.evidence: It is patchily distributed in Queensland, roughly southeast of a line between Mackay and Charleville, being somewhat more common towards the extreme southeast of the state

relations.subject: Speckled warbler
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is temperate forests
